quoteLast: the external temperature was 23·9° F., and the temperature of the atmosphere in the cave at the same time was 30°·88 F.;[217] so that there is no wonder the current of air should be strong.
title: Ice-Caves of France and Switzerland
author: Browne, G. F. (George Forrest), 1833-1930

quoteLast: on the 9th, and at 4 P.M. on the 10th.
